Ableton Workflow

Ableton Keyboard Shortcuts

A longer-form shortcut reference, now presented in the same reading shell as the rest of the redesigned site.

Official Ableton Manual Open M4L

Full keyboard shortcut reference for Ableton Live is available from Ableton's manual: Live keyboard shortcuts (Ableton Manual)

Contents

  • Showing and Hiding Views
  • Keyboard Focus and Navigation
  • Working with Sets and the Program
  • Working with Devices and Plug-Ins
  • Editing
  • Adjusting Values
  • Commands for Breakpoint Envelopes
  • Loop Brace and Start/End Markers
  • Zooming, Display and Selections
  • Clip View Editor View Modes
  • Clip View Sample Editor
  • Clip View MIDI Note Editor
  • Grid Snapping and Drawing
  • Global Quantization
  • Session View
  • Arrangement View
  • Comping
  • Bounce to Audio
  • Commands for Tracks
  • Transport
  • Audio Engine
  • Browser
  • Similar Sample Swapping
  • Key/MIDI Map Mode & Computer MIDI Keyboard
  • Momentary Latching Shortcuts
  • General Keyboard Navigation & Workflow
  • Editing Automation & Modulation Envelopes
  • Accessing Menus
  • Using Live’s Context Menu
  • Live 12 Additions
  • Push 1 Quick Reference

Showing and Hiding Views

ActionWindows
Toggle full screen modeF11
Toggle second windowCtrl+Shift+W
Toggle Session / Arrangement viewTab
Toggle between Device / Clip viewShift+Tab or F12
Toggle Hot-Swap modeQ
Toggle Drum Rack / last selected padD
Hide / Show Info ViewShift+?
Hide / Show Video WindowCtrl+Alt+V
Hide / Show BrowserCtrl+Alt+B or Ctrl+Alt+5
Hide / Show OverviewCtrl+Alt+O
Hide / Show In / OutCtrl+Alt+I
Hide / Show SendsCtrl+Alt+S
Hide / Show MixerCtrl+Alt+M
Hide / Show Clip ViewCtrl+Alt+3
Hide / Show Device ViewCtrl+Alt+4
Hide / Show the Groove PoolCtrl+Alt+6
Open the SettingsCtrl+,
Close window / dialogEsc

Keyboard Focus and Navigation

ActionKey
Move focus to the Control BarAlt+0
Move focus to the Session ViewAlt+1
Move focus to the Arrangement ViewAlt+2
Move focus to the Clip ViewAlt+3
Move focus to the Device ViewAlt+4
Move focus to the BrowserAlt+5
Move focus to the Groove PoolAlt+6
Move focus to the Help ViewAlt+7
Move focus to the Selected Clip PanelAlt+8
Move focus to the Clip PanelsAlt+Shift+P

The following shortcuts are available when the Use Tab to Move Focus command is enabled:

ActionKey
Move to next focusable controlTab
Move to previous focusable controlShift+Tab
Move to next neighbor of current control (same row)Ctrl+Tab
Move to previous neighbor of current control (same row)Ctrl+Shift+Tab

Working with Sets and the Program

ActionKey
New Live SetCtrl+N
Open Live SetCtrl+O
Save Live SetCtrl+S
Save Live Set As…Ctrl+Shift+S
Quit LiveCtrl+Q
Export Audio/VideoCtrl+Shift+R

Working with Devices and Plug-Ins

ActionKey
Group DevicesCtrl+G
Ungroup DevicesCtrl+Shift+G
Reset Parameter ValueDelete or double-click
Load Selected Device from BrowserEnter
Hot-Swap Selected DeviceQ
Show/Hide Plug-In WindowCtrl+Alt+P

Editing

ActionKey
CutCtrl+X
CopyCtrl+C
PasteCtrl+V
DuplicateCtrl+D
UndoCtrl+Z
RedoCtrl+Y
RenameCtrl+R
SplitCtrl+E
JoinCtrl+J
Select AllCtrl+A
Select Multiple ItemsCtrl+click / Shift+click

Adjusting Values

ActionKey
Decrement/IncrementUp and Down arrow keys
Decrement/Increment in Octaves or Fine AdjustmentsShift + Up/Down arrow keys
Finer Resolution When DraggingShift
Return to DefaultDelete
Type In Value0 … 9
Cancel Value EntryEsc
Confirm Value EntryEnter

Commands for Breakpoint Envelopes

ActionKey
Toggle Automation ModeA
Finer Resolution When DraggingShift
Create Curved Automation SegmentAlt
Momentarily Toggle Fade ControlsF
Delete Selected Breakpoint EnvelopeCtrl+Delete

Loop Brace and Start/End Markers

ActionKey
Set Start MarkerCtrl+F9
Set Loop Brace StartCtrl+F10
Set Loop Brace EndCtrl+F11
Set End MarkerCtrl+F12
Nudge Loop Left/RightLeft / Right arrow keys
Move Loop by Loop LengthUp / Down arrow keys
Halve/Double Loop LengthCtrl + Up/Down arrow keys

Zooming, Display and Selections

ActionKey
Zoom In WindowCtrl +
Zoom Out WindowCtrl -
Zoom In Time Ruler+
Zoom Out Time Ruler-
Scroll Display to Follow PlaybackCtrl+Shift+F
Scroll Left/RightShift + scroll
Pan Left/Right of SelectionCtrl+Alt drag

Clip View Editor View Modes

ActionKey
Switch Between Sample/Envelopes TabsCtrl Tab
Switch Between Notes/Envelopes/MPE TabsCtrl Tab
Switch to Sample/Notes TabAlt+Shift+1
Switch to Envelopes TabAlt+Shift+2
Switch to MPE TabAlt+Shift+3

Clip View Sample Editor

ActionKey
QuantizeCtrl+U
Quantize Settings…Ctrl+Shift+U
Move Selected Warp MarkerLeft / Right arrow keys
Select Warp MarkerCtrl + Left/Right arrow keys
Scroll Display to Follow PlaybackCtrl+Shift+F
Zoom to Clip SelectionZ
Zoom Back from Clip SelectionX
Insert Warp MarkerCtrl+I
Delete Warp MarkerDelete
Insert TransientCtrl+Shift+I
Delete TransientCtrl+Shift+Delete
Fit Content to View WidthW
Fit Content to View HeightH

Clip View MIDI Note Editor

ActionKey
Select All NotesCtrl+A
Copy NotesCtrl drag
Chop Selected Notes on Grid / Split NotesCtrl+E
Chop Notes in IncrementsCtrl+E drag / Ctrl+Shift+E
Join NotesCtrl+J
Fit Notes to Time RangeCtrl+Alt+J
Fit Content to View WidthW
Fit Content to View HeightH
Scroll Editor VerticallyPage Up / Page Down
Scroll Editor Vertically in Fine IncrementsShift + Page Up / Page Down
Scroll Editor HorizontallyCtrl + Page Up / Page Down
Move Insert Marker to Beginning/EndHome / End
Select Next/Previous NoteAlt + Up/Down arrow keys

Grid Snapping and Drawing

ActionKey
Toggle Draw Mode (Pitch Lock Off)B
Narrow GridCtrl+1
Widen GridCtrl+2
Triplet GridCtrl+3
Snap to GridCtrl+4
Fixed/Zoom-Adaptive GridCtrl+5

Global Quantization

ActionWindows
Sixteenth-Note QuantizationCtrl+6
Eighth-Note QuantizationCtrl+7
Quarter-Note QuantizationCtrl+8
1-Bar QuantizationCtrl+9
Quantization OffCtrl+0

Session View

ActionWindows
Launch Selected Clip/SlotEnter
Select Neighboring Clip/SlotArrow keys
Select All Clips/SlotsCtrl+A
Copy ClipsCtrl drag
Insert MIDI clipCtrl+Shift+M
Insert SceneCtrl+I
Capture MIDICtrl+Shift+C
Record to Session ViewCtrl+Shift+F9

Arrangement View

ActionWindows
Split Clip at SelectionCtrl+E
Consolidate Selection into ClipCtrl+J
Crop Selected ClipsCtrl+Shift+J
Create Fade/CrossfadeCtrl+Alt+F
Momentarily Toggle Fade HandlesF
Toggle Loop BraceCtrl+L
Adjust Loop Brace LengthCtrl + Left/Right arrow keys

Comping

ActionWindows
Show Take LanesCtrl+Alt+U
Add Selected Take Lane Area to Main Track LaneEnter
Audition Selected Take LaneT
Add Take LaneShift+Alt+T

Bounce to Audio

ActionWindows
Bounce to New TrackCtrl+B
Paste Bounced AudioCtrl+Alt+V

Commands for Tracks

ActionWindows
Insert Audio TrackCtrl+T
Insert MIDI TrackCtrl+Shift+T
Insert Return TrackCtrl+Alt+T
Rename Selected TrackCtrl+R
Group Selected TracksCtrl+G
Ungroup TracksCtrl+Shift+G
Arm Selected TracksC
Solo Selected TracksS
Deactivate Selected Track0

Transport

ActionWindows
PlaySpace
Continue Play from Stop PointShift+Space
Stop Playback at End of SelectionCtrl+Space
Move Insert Marker to BeginningHome
Move Insert Marker to EndEnd
RecordF9

Audio Engine

ActionWindows
Turn Audio Engine On/OffCtrl+Alt+Shift+E

Browser

ActionWindows
Scroll Down/UpUp and Down arrow keys
Hide/Show BrowserCtrl+Alt+B
Close/Open FoldersRight and Left arrow keys
Load Selected Item from BrowserEnter
Preview Selected FileShift+Enter or Right arrow key
Search in BrowserCtrl+F
Browser History Back/ForwardCtrl+[ / Ctrl+]
Show Similar Files Using Similarity SearchCtrl+Shift+F

Similar Sample Swapping

ActionWindows
Swap to Next Similar SampleCtrl+Right arrow
Swap to Previous Similar SampleCtrl+Left arrow
Save as Similarity ReferenceCtrl+Up arrow
Return to ReferenceCtrl+Down arrow

Key/MIDI Map Mode & Computer MIDI Keyboard

ActionWindows
Toggle MIDI Map ModeCtrl+M
Toggle Key Map ModeCtrl+K
Computer MIDI KeyboardM
Adjust Computer MIDI Keyboard Octave Range Up/DownX / Z
Adjust Computer MIDI Keyboard Velocity Up/DownC / V

Momentary Latching Shortcuts

Certain shortcuts toggle while held — examples: A, B, S, Z, Tab, F1–F8.

General Keyboard Navigation & Workflow

ActionWindows
Use Tab to move focus / navigateTab / Shift+Tab
Ctrl+Tab / Ctrl+Shift+Tab for neighbor navigationCtrl+Tab / Ctrl+Shift+Tab

Editing Automation & Modulation Envelopes

Use the keyboard to add, move and delete envelope breakpoints; common modifiers: Ctrl / Alt / Shift.

Accessing Menus

ActionWindows
Open menu by letter (Windows)Alt + first letter (e.g., Alt+F for File)

Using Live’s Context Menu

Open context menu with right-click or Menu / Shift+F10 on Windows; common context actions vary by area.

Live 12 Additions

ActionWindows
Open MIDI Transformations panelCtrl+Shift+M (in Clip editor)
Generate MIDI (AI generate clip)Right-click clip slot → Generate MIDI
Humanize selected notesMIDI Transform → Humanize (no default key)
Seed new session (re-roll generative clip)Right-click generated clip → Generate Again
Enable / disable Collection colour filterClick coloured dot in Browser header bar
Capture MIDI (as in Live 10+, unchanged)Shift+Ctrl+C

Push 1 Physical Quick Reference

Hardware button combos for common Push 1 tasks — supplement to the full Push reference page.

ActionPush 1 Button Combo
Enter Note Mode (pad grid)Note
Enter Session Mode (clip grid)Session
Enter 64-Pad ModeNote → double-press bottom-left pad
Add new instrument trackAdd Track
Select device on trackDevice (then ◄ ► encoder buttons)
Record clip in Session viewRecord + pad
Undo last actionShift + Back (= Undo)
Delete selected clipDelete + pad
Toggle MetronomeMetronome (tap)
Tap TempoTap Tempo (repeated presses)
Change Scale Root / ModeShift + Note, then soft-buttons
Automate a parameterAutomation → touch encoder to write
Access User Mode (custom MIDI)User 1 or User 2

Built for fast lookups, cleaner routing decisions, and practical studio recall.
